Friends:

As of last week, I am unemployed. I'm currently looking for a new job
possibly doing the same thing or maybe a sales/marketing for the college
industry. If yall hear of anything, please send it my way, I may be coming
back to Texas as well. I will let yall know and appreciate any help you may
give me. As I explore my options, I'll decide exactly what I'm looking for.


-Dustin L. Kalman
